question: What was the amount I was pre-approved for when I got my mortgage from Wells Fargo?

retrieval_results.context:
User is a prospective homeowner excited to move into a new home soon, looking forward to owning a backyard, and recalling a prior pre‑approval for a $400,000 Wells Fargo loan.
User wants an estimate of their monthly mortgage payment, property taxes, and insurance.
User wants an estimate of how much they will need to pay out of pocket for closing costs if the seller agrees to cover the additional $3,250.
User has decided to use Trello as a project management tool for the move and wants to schedule a home insurance policy with Liberty Mutual, seeking tips on what to focus on when reviewing the policy documents.
User wants to understand how much of the closing costs can be negotiated with the seller based on the inspection report.
User has minor roof and plumbing issues identified in the inspection report, already received a $2,000 credit toward closing costs, and is considering asking the seller to cover an additional 1% of the purchase price ($3,250) to cover closing costs, seeking assessment of reasonableness.
User rented a storage unit from a company on March 1st to store belongings while closing on the house and wants to confirm moving details with the storage unit company, including moving date, truck size, and labor assistance.
User is located in the 78749 zip code and is seeking cable and TV service providers and their prices for the new home, as well as electricity and gas service providers in the area.
User needs to schedule appointments for electricity and gas setup and is looking for a time‑tracking tool or app to manage all moving‑related appointments and tasks.
